sources.label: RA Shanghai
sources.cadence: Daily; repeat Thu/Fri before the weekend
sources.trigger: Use Chrome + Computer Use when fetch returns 403, empty listings, or stale results.

sources.label: SmartShanghai nightlife
sources.cadence: Daily; repeat after monthly clubbing guide updates
sources.trigger: Use Chrome + Computer Use when public fetch times out, returns incomplete markup, or misses event cards.

sources.label: Xiaohongshu searches
sources.trigger: Use Chrome + Computer Use with logged-in search; do not rely on unauthenticated fetch.

sources.label: WeChat official accounts and groups
sources.cadence: Daily for known accounts; urgent checks when leads mention ticket QR or set times
sources.trigger: Use Chrome + Computer Use or phone-side capture; WeChat articles, groups, and mini-programs are app/session bound.

sources.label: Venue official accounts
sources.cadence: Daily for active venues; repeat on event day
sources.trigger: Use Chrome + Computer Use when venue content is only in social feeds, stories, or app-only posts.

sources.label: Promoter posters
sources.cadence: Daily discovery; OCR/extract whenever a new poster appears
sources.trigger: Use Chrome + Computer Use to inspect image posts, stories, reposts, and posters that expose details only in the image.

sources.label: Ticketing apps and mini-programs
sources.cadence: Daily; repeat before publishing any ticket CTA
sources.trigger: Use Chrome + Computer Use for app-only flows, mini-program tickets, captchas, login walls, or JS-rendered ticket pages.

sources.label: DJ and label accounts
sources.cadence: Every 2-3 days; daily for touring DJs already on the calendar
sources.trigger: Use Chrome + Computer Use for logged-in social feeds, stories, reposts, and platform search that blocks simple fetch.

events.title: Love Bang: Baby Dance Machine
events.description: Basement dive-bar release party energy with club music, house, techno, ghettotech, and rough-edged local flavor.

events.title: Byyb Radio Shanghai w/ CONCEPTUAL
events.description: A compact afternoon techno transmission rather than a club night, useful as an early-year scene marker.

events.title: Antigen pres. Lorenzo Senni
events.description: Experimental electronic night with Lorenzo Senni, Soft Cou live, Devil's Hole, DJ EBP, and local late-night support.

events.title: Techno Basics
events.description: Ma Haiping, Liquid Mechanics, Shukai, and Okkultative at Abyss. One of the cleanest early-2026 techno entries.

events.title: VOID x VACUUM x EXIT
events.description: Shanghai techno crews VOID and VACUUM together at EXIT; deep, hypnotic, raw local pressure.

events.title: EXXX: Plural Body
events.description: Techno and bass at EXIT with Empress CC!, HeShang, Illsee, and Wax9; flexible, self-defined underground energy.

events.title: Tech-no-logical World: Motor City Machine Funk
events.description: Detroit-techno-focused night with Shanghai Ultra, NAXIN, Nik HilP, and DJ Doggy.

events.title: POTENT 5-Year Anniversary
events.description: Two-night anniversary with Audrey Danza, Angioma, Boris, Temple Rat, Max Shen, and Stefano Dvt.

events.title: TEMPIO x POTENT Shanghai
events.description: Tempio's China tour stop with Elisa Bee, Industrial Romantico, Urban Danging Prophets, and Gaoqiao.

events.title: Schwartz Reignited
events.genre: industrial, dark hypnotic, acid, rave, experimental techno
events.description: Pure techno with industrial, acid, dark, and experimental tone in EXIT's basement room.

events.title: House of Visions pres. Noizar & Soyo
events.description: Two-room Reactor night with Noizar and Soyo, built around precision, rhythm, and East Asian underground texture.

events.title: Siam After Dark feat. XULALIT
events.description: Polished hotel anniversary night with Thai artist XULALIT. More sleek date night than warehouse rave.

events.title: KNOT pres. CAM GIRL
events.description: KNOT's high-energy club lane: trance, hyperpop, hard dance, baile funk, jersey club, and rave nostalgia.

events.title: The Rite w. Lacchesi
events.description: Maison Close artist Lacchesi at Abyss with fast, high-energy, warehouse-influenced techno.

events.title: A.T.M pres. RUI HO
events.description: Forward club music with RUI HO, SAN CHUAN, and Oil Nature at Reactor.

events.title: Anyma presents ÆDEN
events.price: Sold out on official tour page
events.description: Major open-air audiovisual show with Prospa, Ben Bohmer, Kolsch, Kasia, and Stylo support.

events.title: EDK x DARK HAZE: Death Descends
events.description: A dark hard-techno and black-metal crossover night at Abyss.

events.title: ABIBAS CLUB: SLAV DEAD HOUSE
events.description: Industrial, hardbass, hardcore, electro, jumpstyle, and slavic punk collision at Abyss.

events.title: Linear System
events.description: Straight POTENT techno booking with Bambi and Linear System.

events.title: System Secret Party
events.description: Limited-capacity secret-location party described as industrial, underground, and high-tech.

events.title: Cocarde Revival Night
events.description: French electronic crew reunion at EXIT with house, tech house, and techno.

events.title: Heim x ALTER.: Up 2 U Warehouse Rave
events.description: All-day warehouse-style mini-festival across rooftop and indoor stages with food, drinks, and about 20 DJs.

events.title: MET Underground Festival with CAPTAIN25
events.description: Tokyo underground selector CAPTAIN25 brings global dancefloor fluency to EXIT.

events.title: BODY LOOP: From Rhythm to Machines
events.description: A dancefloor history session moving from funk and industrial into house and techno.

events.title: HOTL4B Reloaded: 2-Hall Rave Night
events.description: Two-hall Reactor rave with HOTL4B and onefortyasia rooms.

events.title: egregore.ttte presents TOMO
events.description: Free Wigwam night leaning deep, ambient, and techno with TOMO, Chingyi, and Rainsoft.

events.title: JANEIN (DE)
events.description: RA guide/listing lead for JANEIN at POTENT with Stefano Dvt and Peyotl noted in search listings.

events.title: NIGHTWAVE feat. Juliano Allgayer
events.description: Sleek hotel-club night from Space Panda. Good for polished pre-midnight energy.

events.title: On The Cutting Edge w. Tham
events.description: Harder-edge Abyss booking surfaced by RA guide and Tham artist listings.

events.title: FaQ pres. Caroline Roxy
events.description: Hard techno and hardcore at Abyss with Caroline Roxy, LOD, Fischmonger, SHU, and XDISTR.

events.title: SUNKISSED Rooftop feat. Tom Price
events.description: Rooftop Space Panda event on the Bund; strongest for easy date-night scenery.

events.title: Techno Worlds x VACUUM: Final Sampling
events.description: A high-fit techno head pick: ECILO, Ma Haiping, NAXIN, RO, IXWELE, and VJ Ada at EXIT.

events.title: Sympathy FM w/Love Bang (Dark Dance Music, Italo Disco, Electro, J-Pop)
events.description: DJ Heatwolves from Shanghai-based label Love Bang does a long set at this surreal C-Park bar. Expect dark-but-cute, cute-but-dark sounds ranging from Italo Disco to Electro, from Chicago House to goth, from J-Pop to Cantopop, and more. Keepin it tough and melodic. Free entry.

events.title: 99 God (Live Hip Hop, Trap, Bass)
events.description: NYC-based underground rapper 99 God headlines the night at this C-Park club, with support from a bunch of DJs in the hip hop/beats/bass/club music scene, including Warlock from Preme, 647, Kongbb, and more.

events.title: CLTX
events.description: SmartShanghai lead for one of Abyss's harder June bookings. Treat as single-source until the venue/ticket post is checked.

events.title: FRUITYGROOVE Meets Soul Navigator
events.description: REACTOR Shanghai hosts FRUITYGROOVE Meets Soul Navigator at C-PARK, with house and hip-hop leaning selectors and a published running order through late night.
events.address: D-L1-03, B1, C-PARK, No. 638 Zhaohua Road, Changning District, Shanghai

lineup.name: KaleidoJazzlegs
lineup.note: Opening selector on RA's published running order.

lineup.name: Dada (ES)

events.title: Horizon Rooftop feat. Erik Hagleton
events.description: Outdoor Bund rooftop party. This is the smoothest date-friendly pick before a harder afterparty.

events.title: Love Bang: The Woods
events.description: Single-source lead for Love Bang's darker Specters night: goth, darkwave, dark italo, industrial, post-punk, EBM, and witch house.

events.title: Matisa + Limsum
events.description: Late POTENT booking with Matisa, Limsum, and Max Shen. More bright and rolling than hard, but a strong club pick.

events.title: Nova Events Presents: Sunset Sessions - Flair Rooftop Party
events.price: 188 early bird / 228 presale / 258 door, includes 1 drink

posterEvidence.status: Event images and WeChat/App ticket QR references are visible on the detail page.

events.title: REACTOR pres. Nosaj Thing
events.description: C-Park electronic pick with DJ LOVERBOY, DJ EBP, Nosaj Thing, and GaoQiao. Not techno, but a credible experimental late-night option.
events.address: D-L1-03, B1, C-PARK, No. 638 Zhaohua Road, Changning District, Shanghai

events.title: System summer pop-up
events.description: SmartShanghai reports System returning to the Shanghai Hotel e-sports arena on Saturdays until early August. Lineups need promoter confirmation.

events.title: Sunset Sundays
events.description: The Dome runs a Sunday sunset series with DJ Rain, curated music, cocktails, shisha, and a Bund skyline view through June 28; useful as a low-intensity date-night lead.
events.address: 5/F, 1 Yan'an Dong Lu, near Zhongshan Dong Yi Lu, Huangpu District

lineup.name: DJ Rain

posterEvidence.status: Event image is visible on the detail page.

events.title: ALTER. Pavillon
events.description: Long-form Yu Garden-adjacent session by ALTER. and byyb with DJs, a radio livestream, and Wang Meng + Yu Miao live.

events.title: Night at the Museum: Back to the 90s Disco Night
events.description: Fotografiska's 90s-themed late-night disco event uses multi-floor DJ sets and museum space; it is useful as a date-night club lead but is not a high-fit techno pick.
events.address: 127 Guangfu Lu, near Jinyuan Lu, Jing'an District

posterEvidence.status: Event images and WeChat/App ticket QR references are visible on the detail page.

events.title: MRD
events.description: SmartShanghai lead: fast but not hard eurodance, trance, and techno at Dirty House. Verify before planning.

events.title: Liminal Dreams
events.description: SmartShanghai lead for an ambient and outer-music night across Asia. More listening-session than rave.

events.description: SmartShanghai lead for another harder-end Abyss booking. Needs official venue/ticket confirmation before planning around it.

computerUseQueue.label: RA Shanghai
computerUseQueue.cadence: Daily; repeat Thu/Fri before the weekend
computerUseQueue.trigger: Use Chrome + Computer Use when fetch returns 403, empty listings, or stale results.
computerUseQueue.collectionGoal: Confirm event pages, dates, lineup, venue, price, and ticket links.
computerUseQueue.confirmationRule: Treat as a discovery lead until confirmed by a public event page, official venue/promoter/artist account, or ticketing source.
collectionChecklist: event title and series name
absolute date, doors time, start time, end time, and timezone
venue name, room/floor, city, district, full address, and map/search hint
promoter, venue host, label, or organizing crew
full lineup, B2B notes, set order, set times, and live/DJ format when available
poster or flyer image source, screenshot reference, and OCR text from image-only details
artist introductions: origin/city, genres, labels, notable releases, aliases, and official profile links
future tour plan: upcoming cities/dates from artist, label, venue, RA, Bandsintown/Songkick, Bandcamp, Instagram, Weibo, or WeChat when available
ticketing status: platform, public URL or mini-program name, QR/source reference, price tiers, fees, door price, availability, sold-out/waitlist status, refund rules, and purchase cutoff
age/ID, entry policy, dress/door notes, cancellation or lineup-change notices
all second-layer links: event detail, ticketing, venue, promoter, artist, label, poster image, and related tour announcement links
source publication date, last checked date, source confidence, and whether each detail is official, ticketing, social, or image-derived
deepCollectionRules: Open and inspect second-layer links instead of stopping at a listing card or search result.
If key details are inside images, posters, stories, or screenshots, capture the image reference and OCR/transcribe the relevant text.
For every lineup artist, open official or high-signal profile links when available and collect a short sourced artist intro.
For touring artists, look for future city/date announcements beyond Shanghai and record source links or screenshot references.
For ticketing, inspect the final ticket page or mini-program reference, not only the promoter CTA.
Keep app-only, group-only, or screenshot-only claims at watch level until corroborated by official, ticketing, venue/promoter, RA, SmartShanghai, artist, or label evidence.
requiredFields: event title and series name
absolute date, doors time, start time, end time, and timezone
venue name, room/floor, city, district, full address, and map/search hint
promoter, venue host, label, or organizing crew
full lineup, B2B notes, set order, set times, and live/DJ format when available
poster or flyer image source, screenshot reference, and OCR text from image-only details
artist introductions: origin/city, genres, labels, notable releases, aliases, and official profile links
future tour plan: upcoming cities/dates from artist, label, venue, RA, Bandsintown/Songkick, Bandcamp, Instagram, Weibo, or WeChat when available
ticketing status: platform, public URL or mini-program name, QR/source reference, price tiers, fees, door price, availability, sold-out/waitlist status, refund rules, and purchase cutoff
age/ID, entry policy, dress/door notes, cancellation or lineup-change notices
all second-layer links: event detail, ticketing, venue, promoter, artist, label, poster image, and related tour announcement links
source publication date, last checked date, source confidence, and whether each detail is official, ticketing, social, or image-derived

collectionChecklist: event title and series name
absolute date, doors time, start time, end time, and timezone

deepCollectionRules: Open and inspect second-layer links instead of stopping at a listing card or search result.
If key details are inside images, posters, stories, or screenshots, capture the image reference and OCR/transcribe the relevant text.
For every lineup artist, open official or high-signal profile links when available and collect a short sourced artist intro.
For touring artists, look for future city/date announcements beyond Shanghai and record source links or screenshot references.
For ticketing, inspect the final ticket page or mini-program reference, not only the promoter CTA.
Keep app-only, group-only, or screenshot-only claims at watch level until corroborated by official, ticketing, venue/promoter, RA, SmartShanghai, artist, or label evidence.

notes: This v1 scraper keeps curated embedded events as the seed dataset, refreshes source metadata, and adds parsable public event pages as watch/secondary entries.
Computer Use collected event updates in config/curated-events.json are merged after the automated source refresh.
Events from listing/editorial pages remain watch-level until a direct venue, promoter, ticketing, or event page confirms details.
X keyword searches are discovery-only social leads and never promote an event into the calendar without confirmation from a stronger source.
Known anti-bot or app-only sources are queued for agent-operated Chrome + Computer Use collection instead of being scraped with plain fetch.
Computer Use collection must follow second-layer links and image/poster text to capture time, venue, lineup, poster evidence, artist introductions, future tour dates, and ticketing status.
DJ itinerary overlays are regenerated from source-backed futureTourPlan fields while preserving curated worldwide overlays in data/tracked-dj-itineraries.js.
